name: Squaw Grove Dental
ownerEmailNotes: Listed for Dr. Keith Barnhart on the Hinckley Business Association member directory.
designNotes: Clean clinical, NOT beige: cool white #F4FAFB bg, deep navy #123A56, fresh teal #1FA8A0 accent, sky #5AB6D6. Poppins + Work Sans. Layered Canva hero (neutral prompt - business name tripped Canva filter, retried 3x) over Unsplash dental-office fallback + navy gradient. Schema Dentist. New-patient special placeholder price. Logo: text wordmark (FB Graph egress blocked).

hero.note: First 2 generate-design attempts failed (business name 'Squaw' likely tripped Canva content filter); succeeded on 3rd attempt with a neutral dental prompt.

aiAssets.galleryNote: No photo gallery section (clinical layout uses feature band instead); hero is bespoke Canva. Adobe Stock pipeline skipped - sandbox egress blocked.
